patches.summary: Hand-built local-SQLite source adapter (snapshot + FTS5 + typed queries) over Safari's History.db, replacing the HTTP client.
patches.reason: Data source is Safari's local History DB, not an HTTP API — the generator has no local-datastore path yet.

patches.summary: Hand-authored timeline/rabbitholes/dwell/graph/profile/topic commands over the local store (journeys/searches/downloads are capability-gated off for Safari).
patches.reason: Transcendence features over the local store; not generatable from a spec.

patches.summary: Cross-device (origin) partitioning via history_visits.origin (this/synced, binary) + --device filter + devices command.
patches.reason: Safari history includes synced other-device activity; surfaced as a first-class dimension (no per-device identity, unlike Chrome).
